title: graphify x obsidian is a cheat code
summary: Chase AI discusses how combining graphify with Obsidian creates a powerful workflow. The integration leverages both tools' strengths for knowledge management and visualization.
writeup: Chase AI covers a workflow that pairs Graphify with Obsidian for knowledge management and visualization. The integration combines the strengths of both tools, drawing on knowledge graphs and recommendation systems. The takeaway: linking the two creates a more capable setup for organizing and surfacing connected notes than either tool alone.
